title: hieracium laevigatum subsp. neolygodes
intro: Hieracium laevigatum subsp. neolygodes, also known as a subspecies of the smooth hawk's-beard, is a flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Hieracium laevigatum subsp. neolygodes is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting digestive health. The herbal preparations of Hieracium laevigatum subsp. neolygodes include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
